name: Gram
description: The heavy two-handed sword known as Gram requires great strength to wield, but it is notorious for its splitting power. Can hit multiple targets with each strike.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The heavy two-handed sword known as Gram requires great strength to wield, but it is notorious for its splitting power. Can hit multiple targets with each strike.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes:
Gram Prime
Gram Prime
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.0.8 + 30.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee and Mirage Relics in the drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Gram Prime
Gram Prime

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime have entered the Vault!

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gram/Gram Prime having bad animations when equipped with the Mortier Heavy Blade Skin.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.4 + 24.4.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gram using Galatines elemental FX.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes: *Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics are also still out in the wild.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Gram Prime not using correct sound FX.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the unintentional Melee Combo Counter cap of 180 for the Gram Prime.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics have replaced all exclusive locations of Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics:
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to see new Relics for Chroma/Rubico/Gram Prime in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: The Scindo series, Gram, Galatine, Magistar, Fragor and Jat Kittag have had their damage and Stance damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed a number of issues with melee items/weapons that result in radial damage. Radial damage values have been significantly lowered on melee ground attacks, especially for the Galatine, Gram, and Jat Kittag. Exact ranges are as follows:Jat Kittag from 10 meters to 6 meters.
Gram and Galatine from 5 meters to 4 meters.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Increase Stamina drain when blocking with the Gram in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of the Gram in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Edge lights on Gram now respect the chosen color for Energy.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Updated Gram skin to match faction style better. This is automatic, all your Grams are updated!

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.
